zh.conclusion: 美以联军持续打击伊朗，哈梅内伊在空袭中身亡，霍尔木兹海峡几近关闭（周一仅2艘油轮通过，正常60艘/天）

impacts.note: 全球20%石油经霍尔木兹，封锁直接推升供给溢价，Brent飙升13%至$82
油价飙升推高运输成本，Goldman估算已含$18/桶风险溢价
经典避险+数字黄金叙事，黄金测试$5,400后回落至$5,170

zh.conclusion: 美国最高法院裁定IEEPA不授予总统征收关税权力(6:3)，特朗普转用Trade Act第122条加征10%

impacts.note: 对华关税压力缓解，中国资产反弹预期——BABA $130仍被低估
IEEPA关税取消利好，但122条新10%关税增加供应链成本
进口商品关税不确定性下降，采购成本压力缓解

zh.conclusion: Fed理事Miran：尽管中东冲突，继续降息仍合适；Warsh面临降息承诺兑现难题，Powell任期5月到期

impacts.note: 降息预期支撑估值，NVDA获Strong Buy升级
降息压缩浮存金收益，但当前$500仍受高利率环境支撑
降息+Kraken获Fed支付准入=加密行业合法性里程碑

zh.conclusion: S&P 500年内涨幅全部蒸发，Dow跌403点(-0.83%)，Nasdaq跌1.02%，制造业PMI 51.6温和扩张

impacts.note: 风险偏好下降，stagflation担忧加剧，年内收益归零
CoreWeave-Perplexity多年GPU大单验证GB200需求
连续三天发布M5新品，MacBook Air涨价$100或影响需求弹性

en.conclusion: US-Israel strikes continue on Iran, Khamenei killed in airstrike, Hormuz Strait nearly closed (only 2 tankers Monday vs normal 60/day)

impacts.note: 20% of global oil transits Hormuz; Brent surges 13% to $82, Goldman estimates $18/bbl risk premium
Oil spike raises transport costs across supply chain
Classic safe haven + digital gold narrative; gold tested $5,400 before retreating to $5,170

en.conclusion: Supreme Court rules IEEPA does not grant tariff authority (6:3); Trump pivots to Trade Act Section 122 for 10% tariffs

impacts.note: China tariff pressure eased, Chinese assets rebound expected — BABA at $130 still undervalued
IEEPA tariff removal positive, but new 10% Section 122 tariff adds supply chain costs
Import tariff uncertainty reduced, procurement cost pressure easing

en.conclusion: Fed Governor Miran: rate cuts still appropriate despite Middle East conflict; Warsh faces rate-cut pledge challenge, Powell term expires May

impacts.note: Rate cut expectations support valuations; NVDA upgraded to Strong Buy
Rate cuts compress float yield, but $500 still supported by current high-rate environment
Rate cuts + Kraken gets Fed payment access = crypto legitimization milestone

en.conclusion: S&P 500 YTD gains fully erased, Dow -403pts (-0.83%), Nasdaq -1.02%; Manufacturing PMI 51.6 mild expansion

impacts.note: Risk-off sentiment rising, stagflation fears growing, YTD returns wiped
CoreWeave-Perplexity multi-year GPU deal validates GB200 demand
3-day M5 product blitz; MacBook Air +$100 price hike may impact demand elasticity

duan.title: 霍尔木兹封锁+Brent飙升13%，XOM/CVX现金流将大超预期
duan.q: 能源是刚需生意。全球20%石油经霍尔木兹，封锁=暴利。但不追地缘溢价，看长期FCF。

duan.title: 最高法院推翻IEEPA关税+消费韧性验证，COST受益
duan.q: 关税不确定性下降，会员制护城河如茅台。油价越高消费者越需要性价比。

duan.title: NVDA获Strong Buy+CoreWeave大单，但PE 37x仍需耐心
duan.q: GB200需求验证是好事。但$183不追，等战争恐慌给出更好价格。

duan.title: 美伊全面战争+霍尔木兹封锁，Stagflation风险飙升
duan.q: 战争驱动不碰。S&P年内涨幅归零是信号，持有现金等待机会。

buffett.title: CVX $190远低于内在价值，油价$82+分红稳定
buffett.q: 石油在战争中更不可替代。CVX分红+回购=现金回报率7%+，价格合理。

buffett.title: BABA $130获关税缓解利好，PE仅17x
buffett.q: 最高法院裁决让中国资产喘口气。BABA的电商+云=双引擎，这个价格有安全边际。

buffett.title: Fed继续降息立场，BRK浮存金收益面临拐点
buffett.q: 降息压缩浮存金收益率。$500的BRK不便宜，但$3733亿现金是最佳防御。

buffett.title: UNH营收首次预期下滑，Jefferies下调至$340
buffett.q: 好公司遇到坏时机。医疗成本飙升+监管压力，等管理层证明能扭转。

munger.title: Costco在stagflation环境中的反脆弱性验证
munger.q: 最爱。油价越高、通胀越猛，消费者越需要Costco。会员费=纯利润，完美商业模式。

munger.title: NVDA PEG合理+CoreWeave/Perplexity大单验证长期需求
munger.q: 反转思维：什么让AI支出停止？目前看不到。但战争恐慌可能给出$150以下的好价格。

munger.title: Kraken获Fed支付准入+哈萨克斯坦主权基金$3.5亿配置加密
munger.q: 机构化是不可逆趋势。但COIN PE 46x太贵，等市场恐慌时再考虑。

munger.title: S&P年内涨幅归零，Blackstone Bcred遭$17亿净流出
munger.q: 私人信贷赎回+战争+关税=三重压力。别被恐惧驱动，也别逆势抄底。耐心。

duan.title: Hormuz blockade + Brent surges 13%, XOM/CVX cash flow to massively beat
duan.q: Energy is essential. 20% of global oil via Hormuz = blockade profit. Don't chase geo-premium, focus on long-term FCF.

duan.title: Supreme Court overturns IEEPA tariffs + consumer resilience, COST benefits
duan.q: Tariff uncertainty drops. Membership moat like Moutai. Higher oil = more need for value.

duan.title: NVDA gets Strong Buy + CoreWeave deal, but PE 37x needs patience
duan.q: GB200 demand validated. But don't chase $183, wait for war panic pricing.

duan.title: US-Iran full war + Hormuz closure, stagflation risk surging
duan.q: War-driven = avoid. S&P YTD gains wiped is the signal. Hold cash, wait.

buffett.title: CVX at $190 well below intrinsic value, oil $82+ with stable dividends
buffett.q: Oil is irreplaceable in wartime. CVX div+buyback = 7%+ cash return. Fair price.

buffett.title: BABA at $130 gets tariff relief, PE only 17x
buffett.q: Supreme Court ruling gives Chinese assets room. BABA e-commerce+cloud = dual engine at margin of safety.

buffett.title: Fed maintains rate cut stance, BRK float yield faces inflection
buffett.q: Rate cuts compress float yield. BRK at $500 not cheap, but $373B cash is ultimate defense.

buffett.title: UNH first revenue decline in decades, Jefferies cuts to $340
buffett.q: Good company, bad timing. Soaring medical costs + regulatory pressure. Wait for turnaround proof.

munger.title: Costco anti-fragility validated in stagflation environment
munger.q: Favorite. Higher oil, higher inflation = more Costco demand. Membership fee = pure profit.

munger.title: NVDA PEG reasonable + CoreWeave/Perplexity deal validates long-term demand
munger.q: Invert: what stops AI spend? Nothing visible yet. War panic may give $150 entry.

munger.title: Kraken gets Fed payment access + Kazakhstan sovereign fund allocates $350M
munger.q: Institutionalization is irreversible. But COIN PE 46x too rich, wait for panic.

munger.title: S&P YTD gains wiped, Blackstone Bcred sees $1.7B net outflows
munger.q: Private credit redemptions + war + tariffs = triple pressure. Don't panic buy. Patience.

zh.name: 段永平
zh.opinion: 战争溢价不碰，持现金等S&P回调20%再出手

zh.name: Buffett
zh.opinion: CVX/XOM在战时是现金牛，BABA $130有安全边际

zh.name: Munger
zh.opinion: 别被恐惧驱动，COST和NVDA的护城河不因战争改变

en.name: DYP
en.opinion: War premium = avoid. Hold cash, wait for S&P -20%

en.name: Buffett
en.opinion: CVX/XOM are wartime cash cows; BABA at $130 has margin of safety

en.name: Munger
en.opinion: Don't let fear drive you. COST & NVDA moats survive wars

zh.event: 美伊冲突+霍尔木兹封锁
zh.logic: 全球20%石油经霍尔木兹，Brent飙升13%至$82，Goldman估$18/桶风险溢价
对华关税法律基础瓦解，但特朗普122条新10%关税部分对冲利好

zh.event: Fed继续降息立场+Kraken获支付准入
zh.logic: 降息利好成长股估值，加密合法化里程碑，但压缩BRK浮存金收益
油价推高通胀+经济放缓=滞胀，UNH营收首次下滑，消费板块承压
GB200需求持续验证，AI基建支出未见拐点，算力板块整体受益
产品升级符合预期，MacBook Air涨价$100或影响需求弹性，TSM受芯片订单利好

en.logic: 20% global oil via Hormuz; Brent surges 13% to $82, Goldman estimates $18/bbl risk premium
China tariff legal basis collapses; Trump's Section 122 10% partially offsets

en.event: Fed dovish + Kraken gets payment access
en.logic: Rate cuts support growth valuations, crypto legitimization milestone, but compress BRK float yield

en.event: S&P YTD gains wiped + stagflation fears
en.logic: Oil pushes inflation + slowing economy = stagflation; UNH first revenue decline, consumer pressure
GB200 demand validated, AI infra spend shows no inflection, compute sector benefits broadly
Product refresh as expected; MacBook Air +$100 may impact demand elasticity; TSM benefits from chip orders
